notes: Pure Python, minimal dependencies, fast test suite; ideal baseline container workload.
Pure Python web framework; tests run quickly and reliably in Docker.
Poetry-based Python project with async tests; good example of modern Python packaging.
Real-world Poetry usage with a large but manageable pytest suite.
Classic Node.js app using Mocha; straightforward Linux/Docker setup.
Mocha-based test suite with some async complexity but still container-friendly.
Large Jest test suite; mostly JS but complex tooling and config.
Jest-heavy frontend framework with a nontrivial but CPU-only test suite.
Idiomatic Go project; simple toolchain but real-world test layout.
Larger Go project with integration-style tests and tooling orchestration.
Well-behaved Rust workspace; native compilation but predictable builds.
Elixir + Erlang toolchain adds complexity; tests still fast and reliable in Docker.
Plain C with Makefiles; test harness is large and nonstandard but deterministic.
Modern C++ with CMake; toolchain-sensitive but no external dependencies.
Hybrid Rust + frontend stack; more moving parts even without GUI execution.
Real Bazel usage with Go; Bazel configuration dominates complexity.
Large Bazel-based C++ project; optional GPU paths increase complexity.
Heavy native dependencies and optional modules; configuration-sensitive builds.
Native extensions, BLAS/LAPACK linkage, ABI issues; classic hard Python build.
Fortran toolchains and numerical libs make this a reproducibility stress test.
Canonical difficult build: Bazel, large C++ core, optional CUDA, huge test matrix.
Massive native + Python hybrid; GPU, ABI, and toolchain alignment issues.
GPU-first NumPy implementation; CUDA versioning dominates difficulty.
MPI, multi-framework bindings, and distributed assumptions make builds fragile.
Enormous C++ monorepo; compiler bootstrapping and long test cycles.
Blender addon project; tests run inside Blender headless mode in CI. No C++ build needed, but depends on Blender binary.
Neovim core project; Lua + C hybrid; headless integration and unit tests, extensive CI.
Tarantool database; Lua-based logic with C engine; complex integration tests, container-friendly, multi-language CI.
React app with Node/TypeScript; uses Playwright for browser automation in CI; container-friendly headless tests.
Python-based frontend app; CI runs Python Playwright tests for E2E workflows, headless browser execution.
React + D3 visualization library; snapshot and E2E tests with Playwright; container-friendly.
Map visualization app using Deck.gl; full browser-based E2E tests in CI using Playwright; GPU optional.
Dash/Plotly sample apps; tests interactive components using headless browsers in CI; containerizable.
VS Code Electron desktop app; unit and headless E2E tests; CI container builds run --runTests headless.
Electron chat app; GUI integration tests via Spectron; headless CI-friendly.
Electron desktop messaging client; unit + GUI E2E tests; CI runs headless Electron.
Android email client; unit and UI tests; CI runs headless emulator for integration tests.
Android podcast manager; unit + UI tests; container-friendly CI with headless emulator.
Android cloud storage client; unit + UI tests; CI pipeline runs emulator headless for integration testing.
Sample projects demonstrating Buck usage for Java and C++; includes BUCK files and test targets; containerizable and CI-friendly.
Modern Buck2 build system written in Rust; supports Java, C++, and Rust builds; includes extensive unit and integration tests; container-friendly for CI, headless builds.
